devdoc.details: DO NOT deploy to a real network. There is no authentication on         `slash()` in this mock — that responsibility lives in the calling         contract (MimirValidationRegistry). The real AllocationManager         enforces that only registered AVS service-managers may invoke slash.

params.operator: the address whose stake gets reduced
params.reasonHash: 32-byte commitment to the off-chain reason (e.g.,                   keccak256 of the replay-artifact reference)
params.wadSlashed: fraction of allocated stake to remove,                   expressed in WAD (1e18 = 100%, 1e17 = 10%)

_totalSlashed.details: operator => cumulative wadSlashed across all slash() calls

devdoc.title: MockSlasher

Slashed(address,address,uint256,bytes32).notice: Emitted on every slash() invocation. Mirrors what real         EigenLayer AllocationManager emits, in flattened form.

slash(address,uint256,bytes32).notice: Slash an operator's allocation for fraud.

totalSlashed(address).notice: View: how much of `operator`'s allocation has been slashed         cumulatively (sum of wadSlashed across all slash() calls).

userdoc.notice: Test double for EigenLayer's AllocationManager.slash entry point.         Records slash events + cumulative wadSlashed per operator.
